description.p: Through dance and the beat engraved in your body, you gain the ability to buff yourself and debuff your opponent even without a domain.

sheet.description: Through dance and the beat engraved in your body, you gain the ability to buff yourself and debuff your opponent even without a domain.

description.p: Starting at 1st level, as a bonus action for 1 Cursed Energy you can start catching the beat of a fight. The effects depend on how long it has been active and end if you are stunned, paralyzed, grappled, restrained, or knocked prone.

tr.td: Your AC and Dex Saves increase by +2
You can add your Cursed Energy modifier to your attack rolls
Your opponent has disadvantage on attacks and you have advantage on saving throws
Your attacks deal additional damage equal to your proficiency

sheet.description: For 1 CE gain effects based on turns this has been active. Prayer ends if you are stunned, paralyzed, grappled, restrained, or knocked prone. After 1 turn, gain +2 to AC and Dex Saves. After 2 turns, your enemies' AC decrease by 2. After 3 turns, add +{{ce:modifier}} to attack rolls. After 4 turns, opponents have disadvantage on attacks and you have advantage on saving throws. After 5 turns, your attacks do +{{proficiency}} damage.

For 1 CE gain effects based on turns this has been active. Prayer ends if you are stunned, paralyzed, grappled, restrained, or knocked prone. After 1 turn, gain +3 to AC and Dex Saves. After 2 turns, your enemies' AC decrease by 3. After 3 turns, add +{{ce:modifier}} to attack and damage rolls. After 4 turns, opponents have disadvantage on attacks and you have advantage on saving throws. After 5 turns, your attacks do +{{proficiency}} damage. After 6 turns, opponents do {{proficiency}} less damage. After 7 turns, you gain an extra attack when you take the attack action. After 8 turns, your enemies' AC decrease further by 2 and have -5 to saves. After 9 turns, critical range increase by 2. After 10 turns, opponents can only take an action, bonus action, or movement on their turn.

description.p: At 3rd level, you give certain blows more of a kick. Once per turn for 1 CE, you deal 2 additional damage dice on an attack.

sheet.description: Once per turn for 1 CE, deal 2 additional damage dice on an attack.

description.p: Beginning at 6th level, you learn to make openings and stop your enemy's tempo. As a reaction while dancing, you force a creature you see to reroll an attack roll, damage roll, or saving throw.

sheet.description: While Prayer is active, force a creature you see to reroll an attack roll, damage roll, or saving throw.

description.p: Starting at 11th level, your abilities improve and find new heights. Only you gain these benefits against a creature you are fighting.

tr.td: Your AC and Dex Saves increase by +3
You can add your Cursed Energy modifier to your attack and damage rolls
Your opponent has disadvantage on attacks and you have advantage on saving throws
Your attacks deal additional damage equal to your proficiency
Your opponent has their damage decreased by your proficiency
You gain an extra attack when you take the attack action
Your opponent's AC drops by a total of 5, and gains a -5 to saves.
Your opponent can only take an action, bonus action, or movement on their turn.

description.p: At 18th level, you gain the pinnacle of your technique. When inside your domain, you always count as if ten turns passed with Prayer activated.

sheet.description: You always count as if ten turns passed with Prayer activated.

element.name: Domain Expansion: Dance Dance Revolution Replacement
